Task description and verifier.py programmatic checks (prox_count >= 3)

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the fells_loop.gpx dataset, which contains real GPS track and waypoint data created by ExpertGPS/TopoGrafix for the Middlesex Fells Reservation in Massachusetts. The task requires setting proximity alerts of 200 meters (±5m tolerance) on three waypoints and exporting the dataset to a specific path. All metadata claims exactly match the verification logic in verifier.py and the task description instructions. Note that the expected pre_task and post_task hook scripts (setup_task.ps1 and export_result.ps1) are missing from the task directory.
